scenario: agent-skills adapter placeNew(component, conceptId) → on-disk relative path for a skill. Mirrors placement/all-types.json's byType shape. SPECIFICATION golden.
adapterStatus: NOT IMPLEMENTED — spec-authored target (future Chunk-2 format-adapter work item).
specSource: docs/architecture/specs/akm-0.9.0-bundle-adapter-spec.md §2 (placeNew), §6 (skill row: item = the dir), §4.5 (name == parent dir name).
realWorldSource: https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/agents-and-tools/agent-skills/overview — a skill is a directory containing SKILL.md; the folder name is the skill name
notes: SPECIFICATION golden — no agent-skills adapter exists yet. A skill places to <name>/SKILL.md; the conceptId IS the package directory name, and the §4.5 hard rule (name == parent dir name) makes placement a stable round-trip against recognition.
There is exactly one emitted type (skill), so byType has a single entry — this is the narrowest adapter in the set.

nestedResourcePlacementIsInsideThePackag.note: Bundled resources place UNDER the skill package directory; they are not separately placed concepts.
